title: Angular Momentum of a Spinning-Up Propeller
body: A propeller consists of two blades each $$3.0$$ $$m$$ in length and mass $$120$$ kg each. The propeller can be approximated by a single rod rotating about its center of mass. The propeller starts from rest and rotates up to $$1200$$ rpm in $$30$$ seconds at a constant rate.
